mapper.select: SELECT id, name, http_method, endpoint, version, status, description, created_at, updated_at FROM pgdev.api_endpoints ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT f.id, f.field_scope, f.field_location, f.field_name, f.field_type, f.required_yn, f.field_order, f.description, f.sample_value, f.default_value FROM pgdev.api_endpoint_fields f JOIN pgdev.api_endpoint_versions v ON v.id = f.api_version_id WHERE v.endpoint = #{endpoint} AND v.version = #{version} ORDER BY CASE f.field_scope WHEN 'REQUEST' THEN 1 WHEN 'RESPONSE' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, f.field_order ASC

SELECT f.id, f.field_scope, f.field_location, f.field_name, f.field_type, f.required_yn, f.field_order, f.description, f.sample_value, f.default_value FROM pgdev.api_endpoint_fields f JOIN pgdev.api_endpoint_versions v ON v.id = f.api_version_id JOIN pgdev.api_definitions d ON d.id = v.api_definition_id WHERE d.api_name = #{apiName} AND v.version = #{version} ORDER BY CASE f.field_scope WHEN 'REQUEST' THEN 1 WHEN 'RESPONSE' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, f.field_order ASC

SELECT id, api_definition_id, version, endpoint, http_method, status, description, is_current, created_at, updated_at FROM pgdev.api_endpoint_versions WHERE endpoint = #{endpoint} AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pgdev.api_endpoints (name, http_method, endpoint, version, status, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{httpMethod}, #{endpoint}, #{version}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE pgdev.api_endpoints SET name = #{name}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, endpoint = #{endpoint}, version = #{version}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pgdev.api_definitions (api_code, api_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{apiCode}, #{apiName}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO pgdev.api_endpoint_versions ( api_definition_id, version, endpoint, http_method, status, description, is_current, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{apiDefinitionId}, #{version}, #{endpoint}, #{httpMethod}, #{status}, #{description}, #{isCurrent}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pgdev.api_endpoint_versions SET version = #{version}, endpoint = #{endpoint}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, is_current = #{isCurrent}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pgdev.api_endpoint_fields ( api_version_id, field_scope, field_location, field_name, field_type, required_yn, field_order, description, sample_value, default_value, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{apiVersionId}, #{field.fieldScope}, #{field.fieldLocation}, #{field.fieldName}, #{field.fieldType}, #{field.requiredYn}, #{field.fieldOrder}, #{field.description}, #{field.sampleValue}, #{field.defaultValue}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
